common.privacyNotice: Your API key and data are stored locally in your browser to ensure privacy. If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us via the community or feedback page.
common.dragAndDropText: Click or drag file here to upload
common.noTargetLanguage: Select at least one target language
common.singleFileModeTooltip: Keep only one file; new uploads replace the current file
common.hideResultsTooltip: Hide result preview to prevent page lag from large content
common.directExportTooltip: Automatically download after processing, skipping result preview
common.useCacheTooltip: Reuse previous translation cache to speed up processing
common.contextAwareTranslationTooltip: Translate with context for better coherence and accuracy (AI models only)
common.multiLanguageModeTooltip: Translate to multiple languages simultaneously, saved as separate files
common.resetUploadTooltip: Clear current input and uploaded files
common.sameLanguageTarget: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted target to
common.sameLanguageSource: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted source to
common.enterApiKey: Enter API Key or switch to Free API
common.enterApiUrl: Please configure the API URL in 'API Settings'
common.deepLXUnavailable: DeepLX node unavailable, automatically switched to GTX API (Free)
common.deeplUnavailable: DeepL node unavailable, please check configuration in 'API Settings'
common.llmUnavailable: LLM node unavailable, please check configuration in 'API Settings'
common.noFileUploaded: Please upload a file to process first
common.sourceTextPlaceholder: Enter or paste text to process...
common.noSourceText: Please enter or paste text content
common.formatTooltip: Format: remove blank lines and trim leading/trailing spaces
common.resultToSourceTooltip: Overwrite input area with result text
common.readOnlyModeTooltip: Text is too long; automatically switched to read-only mode to maintain page performance
common.clearInputTooltip: Clear input content and uploaded files
common.removeCharsAfterTranslationTooltip: Automatically remove specified characters after translation (separate multiple with spaces)
common.multiLangSettingsHint: Enter language codes, separated by comma or space.
common.retryCountTooltip: Number of retry attempts when translation fails
common.requestTimeoutSecTooltip: Maximum wait per request (seconds). LLM thinking takes longer; 180s or more recommended.
common.customExportFilenameTooltip: '{'name'}' = original filename, '{'lang'}' = language, '{'ext'}' = extension, '{'date'}' = date, '{'time'}' = time
common.partialFailureDesc: Auto-retry couldn't recover them. Failed lines kept the original text. Click Retry (successful lines are served from cache) or view the failed lines to handle them manually.
common.gtxFreeAPIUnavailable: The free Google Translate API (GTX) is currently unavailable. Please check your network connection.
common.translategemmaUnavailable: TranslateGemma node unavailable. Please verify the local server (LM Studio / llama.cpp / Ollama) is running and the URL is correct.

chineseConversion.title: Chinese Conversion
chineseConversion.description: Bulk convert Simplified, Taiwan Traditional, Hong Kong Traditional, and Japanese New Character Form
chineseConversion.metaTitle: Chinese Converter | Simplified ↔ Traditional, Local & Private
chineseConversion.metaDescription: Worried about privacy converting Chinese? Runs locally in your browser, no server upload. Supports Simplified ↔ Taiwan/HK Traditional and Japanese Shinjitai.

faq.q: Which online Simplified-to-Traditional Chinese converter is the best?
faq.a: This tool is powered by the OpenCC engine and supports Simplified ↔ Taiwan Traditional ↔ Hong Kong Traditional ↔ Japanese New Character Form, running entirely locally in your browser with no software to install — accurate and privacy-safe.

faq.q: Does Chinese conversion expose my text content?
faq.a: No. All conversion happens entirely in your browser; text is never uploaded to any server, so you can safely process sensitive content and large volumes of text.

faq.q: What is the difference between Taiwan Traditional and Hong Kong Traditional Chinese?
faq.a: Taiwan Traditional and Hong Kong Traditional differ in some characters and vocabulary — for example 記憶體 (Taiwan) vs 內存 (Hong Kong). This tool accurately distinguishes the two standards to meet the needs of different regions.

howto.name: Paste or type text
howto.text: Paste the Simplified or Traditional Chinese text you want to convert into the input area.

howto.name: Choose conversion direction
howto.text: Pick a direction — Simplified ↔ Taiwan Traditional ↔ Hong Kong Traditional ↔ Japanese Shinjitai.

howto.name: Convert and copy
howto.text: The tool converts in real-time, locally in your browser. Copy the result — text is never uploaded to a server.

features: Fully offline browser processing — no server upload
Custom replacement rules — matched terms bypass the built-in dictionary

CopyToClipboard.unsupported: Browser does not support clipboard, please copy manually

ChineseConversion.description1: No text is uploaded to third-party servers — all conversions run locally in your browser to ensure privacy. Supports bidirectional conversion between Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong), and Japanese New Character Form. Ideal for bulk processing large volumes of text. Click the matching direction button to convert in one click; advanced users can choose custom source and target scripts for precise conversions between specific forms.
ChineseConversion.description2: Examples: Simplified 自行车 → Taiwan Traditional 腳踏車, 视频 → 影片, 内存 → 記憶體 — regional vocabulary differences are auto-converted. For questions or suggestions, please reach out via the community or feedback page.
ChineseConversion.phraseConversionTooltip: Also convert region-specific vocabulary (e.g. 视频 ↔ 影片, 幼儿园 ↔ 幼稚園)
ChineseConversion.smartLineBreakTooltip: Auto-merge broken paragraphs to improve layout
ChineseConversion.directExportTooltip: Download the converted file directly, skipping preview
ChineseConversion.customRulesNotActive: ⚠ Custom replacement rules are inactive for this direction (requires source or target to be Simplified)
ChineseConversion.enterTextError: Please enter or paste text to convert
ChineseConversion.conversionFailed: Conversion failed, please check input or protected rules
ChineseConversion.sameLangError: Source and target scripts cannot be the same

ProtectedRuleManager.description: Rules take priority over the built-in dictionary — matched terms are not converted by OpenCC. On import, duplicate source entries are automatically removed (the last one wins).
ProtectedRuleManager.confirmClearAll: Clear all rules for the current direction?
ProtectedRuleManager.importHint: Import supports OpenCC format text (each line: key[TAB]value, lines starting with # are comments). Rules are appended to the current direction; duplicate sources are removed automatically.
ProtectedRuleManager.puaSanitized: PUA characters (internal placeholder range) automatically removed
ProtectedRuleManager.importNoRules: No valid rules found in file (OpenCC format: each line key[TAB]value)
ProtectedRuleManager.importedWithDedup: Imported {added} rule(s) to {direction}, automatically removed {dedup} duplicate source(s)
ProtectedRuleManager.shadowedTooltip: Shadowed by row {rowNumber}; effective result is "{winnerTo}"
ProtectedRuleManager.emptyTable: No rules yet. Click "Add Rule" to get started.
ProtectedRuleManager.enableProtectedRulesTooltip: When off, the rules below are ignored for this conversion
ProtectedRuleManager.customReplaceTooltip: Matched terms bypass the OpenCC built-in dictionary; managed separately by direction (Simplified → Traditional / Traditional → Simplified)

feedback.feedback2: If you encounter issues or have suggestions, let me know! Your feedback drives future development and helps us build better tools for everyone.
feedback.feedback3: Please describe your use case, issue, or creative idea. I read every message and will respond/optimize as soon as possible.
feedback.placeholder: Leave a message (no login required, email optional for reply)
